title: The Dungeon of Lulu Farea: Rebirth
description:
The fabled Dungeon of Lulu Farea stands as both a home to monsters and a challenge to adventurers. Though rumored to be a gateway to the Underworld, the dungeon is riddled with Goddess's Blessings, divine relics said to grant humans power far beyond their wildest dreams. 

Cruellus is one of many humans drawn to Lulu Farea, but he's more interested in the monsters inhabiting the dungeon than power or glory: in fact, he outright refuses to kill monsters. Join him on his journey to traverse the dungeon and find all the monsters hidden inside!

The Dungeon of Lulu Farea: Rebirth is an engaging blend of traditional turn-based RPG and puzzle game elements, boasting a complex world in which nothing is left to chance and every encounter matters. Genre classics such as fishing and side quests abound, and the game encourages thinking ahead to find the best way to obstacles in order to successfully clear the dungeon.

No Suprises!

Nothing in The Dungeon of Lulu Farea: Rebirth is randomized, from enemy spawns to damage taken and dealt. The entire game can be cleared consistently with well-prepared strategy and consideration, helping avoid potential frustrations and rewarding clever thinking. 

No Respawns, No EXP! A New RPG Experience!

Enemies don't come back once defeated and there are no experience points! There is no need to worry about things like grinding or looking for special drops.

Resource Management! 

Every level of the dungeon plays like a puzzle of resource management where everything you encounter is important, and every choice you make and every piece of gold you earn matters. You can take the game at your own pace through a variety of difficulty options, as well as make use of in-game hints and assistance to tailor your experience!
description_short: Rumored gateway to the Underworld, Lulu Farea is riddled with monsters. Join Cruellus on his journey to befriend them all!
